sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of SonicShares Global Shipping ETF (AMEX:BOAT)

It also includes frequently asked questions explaining what technical ratings, oscillators, pivots, and moving averages mean in trading. The article concludes with a disclaimer that the information provided is not investment advice and encourages users to consider additional data and market conditions.

feed.title: Bausch Health (NYSE: BHC) CFO reports tax-withholding share disposition
feed.summary: Bausch Health Companies Inc.'s Executive Vice President and CFO, Jean-Jacques Charhon, reported a tax-related disposition of 49,060 common shares. These shares, valued at $5.93 each, were withheld to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of Restricted Share Units. This transaction was a non-market withholding to satisfy taxes, not an open-market sale, and Charhon now directly holds 706,478 common shares.

feed.title: Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) Downgraded to "Neutral" Rating by Rothschild & Co Redburn
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn downgraded Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) from "buy" to "neutral" with an $85 price target, representing a 1.96% potential upside. Despite this, the analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $90.36. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates, provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance, and saw significant insider stock purchases.

feed.title: Sempra Energy Stock Rating Upgraded by Argus
feed.summary: Argus, an equity research firm, has upgraded Sempra Energy's stock rating from "hold" to "buy," citing the company's strong financial performance and growth potential. Sempra Energy, a San Diego-based energy infrastructure company, is well-positioned to benefit from the energy transition and infrastructure investment needs due to its diverse portfolio of electricity, natural gas, and LNG assets. This upgrade by a respected firm signals potential growth opportunities and has been echoed by other analysts.

feed.title: Argus Research Maintains BHP Group Ltd(BHP.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $90
feed.summary: Argus Research has reiterated its Buy rating for BHP Group Ltd (BHP.US) and increased its target price from $68 to $90. Analyst John Eade, who has a 66.1% success rate and an average return of 14.8% over the past year, provided the updated target. The information is based on TipRanks data, which offers analyst performance metrics for informational purposes.

feed.title: WEC Rating Maintained, Price Target Raised by Keybanc | WEC Stoc
feed.summary: Keybanc analyst Sophie Karp has reiterated an "Overweight" rating on WEC Energy Group (WEC) and raised its price target from $117.00 to $126.00, reflecting continued optimism. This adjustment follows several other recent analyst ratings, including both increases and decreases in price targets. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $122.75 for WEC, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $103.66, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison (ED) Price Target Raised by Keybanc | ED Sto
feed.summary: Keybanc has maintained its 'Underweight' rating for Consolidated Edison (ED) but raised its price target from $86.00 to $96.00, an 11.63% increase. The article also provides historical analyst ratings from other firms like Barclays, TD Cowen, Scotiabank, and UBS. Consolidated Edison, primarily operating through CECONY and O&R, provides utility services in New York and parts of New Jersey, with nearly all its earnings now from these two entities after selling its clean energy business.

feed.title: Aptiv subsidiary launches $1.5 billion debt offering for spinoff
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC's subsidiaries, Cyprium Corporation and Cyprium Holdings Luxembourg S.à r.l., have initiated a private offering of $1.5 billion in senior notes to fund a dividend to Aptiv as part of a planned spinoff of its Electrical Distribution Systems segment. The offering, consisting of senior notes due 2031 and 2034, is intended to leave Versigent Limited, the holding company for the segment, with $300 million cash on its balance sheet after the transaction. Aptiv's stock (APTV) is currently trading at $71.40, down approximately 6% over the past week, yet InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Rose 21% in the Past Month. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) stock gained 21% in the last month due to strong earnings, bullish analyst commentary, and increasing electricity demand driven by AI. Analysts project significant upside for CEG, with a valuation model suggesting a target price of $500, implying a 54% return. The company's large nuclear fleet, strategic acquisitions, and long-term power agreements position it well to capitalize on rising AI infrastructure and electrification demands.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley's top 50 Swiss watch brands for 2025, analyzed
feed.summary: This article analyzes Morgan Stanley's 2025 report on the top 50 Swiss watch brands, examining shifts in sales and average retail prices. It highlights Rolex's continued dominance, Omega's drop in rankings, and Tudor's impressive growth, while also discussing the impact of a K-shaped economy on watch sales and Swatch Group's challenges. The piece concludes by noting the rise of independent brands like Christopher Ward and Swatch Group's recent criticism of Morgan Stanley's report accuracy.

feed.title: New 2026 guide maps state disability and paid family leave rules for employers
feed.summary: Arch Insurance North America has released its 2026 State Disability & Paid Family Leave Reference Guide. This comprehensive guide provides employers and benefits professionals with crucial details on disability and paid family leave laws across states mandating such coverage, aiming to simplify the complexities of compliance for businesses operating in multiple states. The guide includes information on eligibility, covered conditions, and weekly statutory benefits to help employers reduce uncertainty and operate more efficiently.

feed.title: Johnson Controls International Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.40 per Share; Payable April 10 to Shareholders of Record as of March 16
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.40 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on April 10 to shareholders who are on record as of March 16. This follows recent analyst updates and insider trading activities for the company.

feed.title: Director boosts Bridgeline Digital (BLIN) stake with open‑market share buys
feed.summary: Bridgeline Digital director Michael Ketslakh has increased his holdings in the company through open-market purchases. He acquired a total of 6,959 shares across two transactions on March 2 and March 3, 2026, both at $0.85 per share. Following these purchases, Ketslakh directly owns 493,842 Bridgeline Digital shares.

feed.title: Klarna Expands Resell Integration With eBay to Six Additional Countries
feed.summary: Klarna has announced the expansion of its resale integration with eBay to include six additional countries. This move aims to enhance the user experience for eBay customers in these new markets by providing Klarna's payment solutions for resale transactions. The article, originating from MT Newswires, highlights the growing partnership between the two companies in the e-commerce sector.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean experiments with a cheaper beach club day pass
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean is piloting a new, cheaper day pass option for its Royal Beach Club Paradise Island, priced at $49.99. Unlike the existing all-inclusive passes, this new "Day Pass" does not include food or drinks, which will be available for a la carte purchase. This test, observed on a single sailing of Wonder of the Seas, aims to cater to guests who desire beach access without the full all-inclusive cost.

feed.title: Charles River (CRL) Trims 2026 Outlook After Divestitures and Leadership Changes Is The Strategy Working?
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) reported Q4 and full-year 2025 results with lower revenue and a net loss due to asset impairments. The company then adjusted its 2026 earnings guidance, anticipating a reduction in reported revenue by over US$200 million due to planned divestitures, alongside leadership changes. This new guidance and strategic shifts aim to restore profitable growth, though risks like demand softness and cancellations persist, leading to varied analyst outlooks on future performance and fair value.

feed.title: Lamb Weston to Announce Fiscal Year 2026 Third Quarter Financial Results on April 1, 2026
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced it will report its fiscal year 2026 third-quarter financial results on April 1, 2026. The news release will be issued at approximately 8:30 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. Investors can find webcast details and materials on their Investor Relations page.

feed.title: William Blair Investment Management Cuts Intercontinental Exchange Holdings
feed.summary: William Blair Investment Management significantly reduced its stake in Intercontinental Exchange Inc. by 49.3% in the third quarter of 2026, selling 47,282 shares. This reduction means the institutional investor now holds 48,528 shares of the financial services provider. This move could indicate broader market uncertainty or a shift in the firm's investment strategy.

feed.title: Managed Asset Portfolios Acquires Uber Stake
feed.summary: Managed Asset Portfolios LLC has acquired 8,344 shares of Uber Technologies, Inc. stock, valued at approximately $817,000, during the third quarter of 2026. This new investment suggests the firm sees long-term potential in Uber's diversification efforts beyond ride-hailing into delivery and logistics services. The acquisition was made amidst Uber's stock price volatility, trading between a 52-week low of $60.63 and a high of $101.99.

feed.title: Victory Capital Management Inc. Boosts Stake in The PNC Financial Services Group
feed.summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. has increased its stake in The PNC Financial Services Group by 13.8% in the third quarter, signaling confidence in PNC's value and growth potential. The investment firm now owns over 952,000 shares, worth approximately $191 million. This increase comes as PNC's stock price has risen, reaching a 52-week high in February 2026.

feed.title: Who is the McDonald's CEO? The viral exec is from Cincinnati
feed.summary: Chris Kempczinski, the current CEO of McDonald's, has gone viral for an "awkward" taste-test video of the company's new Big Arch Burger. Despite now being based in Chicago, Kempczinski has strong Cincinnati roots, having graduated from Indian Hill High School and worked at Procter & Gamble. His parents also had prominent careers in the Cincinnati area.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin secures $1.9bn contract for C-130J JMATS IV
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Rotary and Mission Systems has secured a $1.9 billion contract for the C-130J Maintenance and Training System (JMATS) IV programme. Awarded by the US Department of Defense, the contract covers the delivery, upgrade, and support of C-130J aircrew and maintenance training devices. The agreement has a base ordering period of five years, with an option for an additional five years, and three years for completion of all deliveries, expected by February 2039.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Expands Immunodiagnostics Operations with New Distribution and Labeling Center in Uppsala
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has opened a new 8,000-square-meter distribution and labeling center in Uppsala, Sweden, investing $18 million to bolster its immunodiagnostics business. This expansion aims to strengthen the global supply chain for in vitro diagnostic tests used for allergic and autoimmune diseases, supporting future growth and improving efficiency in delivering high-quality diagnostic products worldwide. The center features advanced automation and energy-efficient design, building on Uppsala's strong life science ecosystem and Thermo Fisher's existing research and manufacturing operations.

feed.title: Analysts Are Neutral on Top Financial Stocks: Ameriprise Financial (AMP), Principal Financial (PFG)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued neutral ratings for Ameriprise Financial (AMP) and Principal Financial (PFG), suggesting neither a bullish nor bearish outlook. BMO Capital maintained a Hold rating for Ameriprise with a $560 price target, while Morgan Stanley kept a Hold rating for Principal Financial with a $95 price target. Both companies show a consensus Hold rating from analysts, with slight upside potential from current levels.

feed.title: Teachers Retirement System of Kentucky Reduces Cadence Design Systems Stake

feed.title: Apple’s new $599 MacBook Neo puts AI laptop within reach
feed.summary: Apple has unveiled the new MacBook Neo, an affordable laptop starting at $599 ($499 for education), featuring a durable aluminum design, a 13-inch Liquid Retina display, and the A18 Pro chip. It boasts up to 16 hours of battery life and is significantly faster for everyday tasks and on-device AI workloads compared to leading PC competitors. The MacBook Neo comes in four colors, integrates macOS Tahoe and Apple Intelligence, and is designed with 60% recycled content, making it Apple's lowest-carbon MacBook.

feed.title: LG H&H beverage unit posts first loss since Coca-Cola deal
feed.summary: LG Household & Health Care's beverage unit reported its first quarterly operating loss since acquiring the local Coca-Cola bottling business nearly two decades ago, leading to headcount reductions. The refreshment segment recorded a 9.9 billion won ($6.7 million) operating loss in Q4 2025, driven by changing consumer tastes and distribution environments. The company is also undergoing a wider corporate restructuring due to a significant earnings decline, though a sale of its Coca-Cola operations is not under consideration.

feed.title: What's Going On With ServiceNow Stock Wednesday? - ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW), StarHub (OTC:SRHBF)
feed.summary: ServiceNow shares rose in premarket trading after the company announced a collaboration with NTT DOCOMO and StarHub to develop an AI-powered inter-carrier operational model. This initiative aims to resolve roaming issues faster, improving connectivity for global travelers, with a commercial launch targeted for the second half of the year. Despite the positive news, ServiceNow's stock faces short-term challenges, trading below its 20-day and 100-day SMAs, with mixed momentum indicated by its RSI and MACD.

This surge is attributed to the company's strong financial performance, including a 28% year-over-year revenue increase in its latest quarter. The company, a major player in the exchange and trading venue industry, has also received positive reports and maintained ratings from several research firms.
